## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential Chief of Staff role at fwd.digital for Mariana Chozas](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's rapidly growing AI services company (fwd.digital) needs a Chief of Staff to help manage growth and operations](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Mariana has relevant experience as a trusted right-hand to executives, with strong organizational and execution skills](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Both share values around kindness, excellence, and building positive company cultures](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Next steps: Follow-up meeting scheduled for Monday to continue discussions after both reflect on the opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)

## Topics

### Company Background

  - [Founded 6 months ago, now at $2M ARR with 15 employees](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Offering AI-powered marketing/sales services to clients like Reddit, Ramp, Hagen](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Bootstrapped and profitable, but considering raising funding](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [International team across US, Serbia, Macedonia, South Africa, Sri Lanka](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)

### Marcel's Background and Motivation

  - [Previously CMO at DeepGram and SkillAI](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Started fwd.digital after successful AI workflow workshops](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Motivated to build a different type of company with strong culture after negative experiences](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Wants to create an environment where people do their best work and achieve more than they thought possible](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

### Role and Expectations

  - [Chief of Staff would be an extension of Marcel, helping manage chaos and build systems](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Three levels: 1) Make Marcel effective/efficient 2) Make direct reports effective/efficient 3) Make whole company effective/efficient](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Need someone highly organized, trustworthy, with high standards and intellectual curiosity](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [International/remote work environment, emphasis on hiring top global talent](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)

### Mariana's Background and Strengths

  - [4 years at Momentum, started before funding as volunteer](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Experienced as right-hand to executives, manages immigration, highly organized](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Self-described as energetic, responsible, pushy when needed](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Values feedback, competitive, aims for excellence](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)

### Company Culture and Values

  - [Emphasis on kindness, generosity, relentless excellence](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Goal to create exciting work environment that attracts top talent](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Focus on clear communication, intellectual curiosity, owning outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Desire to prove you can build successful company with positive culture](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=3300.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Both to reflect on conversation over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Monday at 10am Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=3385.0)
  - [Marcel to send calendar invite](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=3410.0)
  - [Mariana to consider fit and potential transition from current role](https://fathom.video/share/xy3h7WPVQpW5kEsAMUaQhke-Pb5Kknqr?tab=summary&timestamp=3398.0)
